title: Third-Party Reuse Manifest — MVP+
description: Records all third-party code reused by MVP+ lanes. Only approved candidates listed; no new dependencies without contract review.

approved_projects.name: hyperliquid-python-sdk
approved_projects.description: Official Hyperliquid Python SDK for public Info API access.

approved_projects.name: ccxt
approved_projects.description: Unified cryptocurrency exchange API. Used for BTC/ETH/SOL market data from Binance.
approved_projects.fallback: httpx direct REST calls to Binance public API

approved_projects.name: httpx
approved_projects.description: Modern Python HTTP client. Used for all HTTP requests.

approved_projects.name: hyperliquid-whales (reference only)
approved_projects.description: Reference implementation for whale position detection. Only local logic migration from MIT-licensed subset.
approved_projects.upgrade_risk: n/a — reference only, not a dependency

internal_phase_candidates.description: Candidates for internal production phase. NOT enabled in MVP+ (no scheduler/daemon).

apscheduler.note: Not installed or used in MVP+. No scheduler/daemon in this phase.

sqlite.note: Available via Python stdlib. Not used in MVP+ (one-shot only).

explicitly_forbidden.name: apscheduler
explicitly_forbidden.reason: Scheduler/daemon not allowed in MVP+ (one-shot only)

explicitly_forbidden.name: redis
explicitly_forbidden.reason: No external data stores in MVP+

explicitly_forbidden.name: aiohttp
explicitly_forbidden.reason: httpx already installed; no duplicate async HTTP
